title: osmorhiza occidentalis var. bolanderi
intro: Osmorhiza occidentalis var. bolanderi, also known as Western sweetroot or Bolander's sweetroot, is a variety of the Western sweetroot plant, a perennial herb native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include being used to treat digestive issues, inflammation, and respiratory problems due to its carminative and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Osmorhiza occidentalis var. bolanderi include alleviating nausea and cramps, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
